stories.title: US to announce deal allowing Saudi Arabia a nuclear programme, reports say
stories.summary: The agreement would fulfil a long-held Saudi ambition but could attract concern in Israel and from some US lawmakers.

stories.title: Ukrainian drones hit more sites of Russian online retailer Wildberries
stories.summary: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight.

stories.title: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
stories.summary: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after backlash over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

stories.title: Iran war has cost US $37.5bn so far, Hegseth says, as Pentagon seeks billions more
stories.summary: The hearing was disrupted by protests and a shouting match as Hegseth testified at a pivotal time in the war.

stories.title: India's Modi government under growing pressure as 'cockroach' protests intensify
stories.summary: The CJP got a boost on Tuesday when the opposition Congress party demonstrated outside the PM's house.

stories.title: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris suburbs
stories.summary: Daniel Siad, whose name appears in the Epstein files thousands of times, had previously denied knowledge of the threat Jeffrey Epstein posed.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Trump plans generic drug tariffs from 2028 with two-year delay testing U.S. onshoring push
stories.summary: The latest tariff salvo underscored Trump's goal of reshoring low-cost drug production, but displacing established suppliers like India won't be easy.

stories.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
stories.summary: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

stories.title: World Cup gave bars and restaurants a needed boost as consumers flash warning signs, Fed says
stories.summary: The latest edition of the Fed's Beige Book indicated that the soccer tournament wasn't necessarily translating to broader economic growth.

stories.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
stories.summary: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

stories.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
stories.summary: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

stories.title: China posts slowest quarterly growth since 2022 as investment slumps, fanning stimulus calls
stories.summary: That second-quarter growth came below Beijing's full-year growth target range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal in decades.

stories.title: Range Rover answers the question: "What if we built a not-SUV?"
stories.summary: The Range Rover GT will debut as an EV with a hybrid version to follow.

stories.title: On the run for 20 years, most-wanted fugitive caught hiding as a biotech exec
stories.summary: Ronald Fischer, aka Richard Graydon, was arrested in New York last week.

stories.title: Sony releases one last trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day

stories.title: Nintendo says users voluntarily paid higher prices, have no right to tariff refunds

stories.title: Let Tom Hiddleston be your guide to Pompeii's final day
stories.summary: NatGeo's Pompeii: Out of Time fuses historical fact and imagination to bring city's last 24 hours to life.

stories.title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
stories.summary: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

stories.title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
stories.summary: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.

stories.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow

stories.title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
stories.summary: A security vulnerability in the Zilliqa Ledger app is enabling attackers to reconstruct private keys using publicly available onchain data.

stories.title: US seeks forfeiture of $25M in crypto tied to romance, investment scams
stories.summary: US prosecutors are seeking more than $25 million in cryptocurrency allegedly connected to international fraud and laundering networks.

stories.summary: Book sales and audiobook figures for Homer's original poem rise sharply after the film's release.

stories.title: Gruesome images in D4vd hearing are 'worst nightmare' for teen girl's family
stories.summary: The court hears the singer ordered a body bag, chainsaws and an inflatable pool to dispose of the teen's body.
